note: Source Loop: Card rating questions for 14 topics, filtered by party targeting

loop.label: SRC_LOOP
loop.title: Source Rating Loop
loop.note: Loop rows: one per topic, conditioned on HHIX101 topic selection
Loop content: exec block to cap sources at 25 items
loop.exec: import random eligible = [r for r in SRC_[loopvar: topicIdx].rows if not r.disabled] random.shuffle(eligible) for r in eligible[25:]: r.disabled = True
loop.note: Card rating question: sources filtered by topic and party

radio.label: SRC_[loopvar: topicIdx]
radio.title:
When was the last time you used this source for news and information on
?
radio.comment: If you've never heard of it before, don't worry – you're definitely not alone. The next source slides in as soon as you answer.
radio.note: Source rows with topic and party conditions
radio.row: Physicians for a National Health Program
National Association of Community Health Centers
Health Care Upside Down (Uwe Reinhardt legacy)
